# SheersSoft — llms.txt

## What is SheersSoft?
SheersSoft (Sheers Software Sdn. Bhd.) is a Kuala Lumpur-based software company that builds AI-powered products and custom web solutions for Malaysian businesses.

## Products
### Nocturn AI
An autonomous hotel booking assistant that handles guest inquiries 24/7 via WhatsApp. Designed for independent and boutique hotels in Southeast Asia.
- Website: https://ai.sheerssoft.com
- Apply: https://ai.sheerssoft.com/apply

### Hotel Genius (Coming Q3 2026)
An AI-powered guest experience platform for hotels — autonomously handles guest enquiries during their stay.

## Services
### Web & Mobile Development
- High-performance websites, PWAs, and native apps
- Built for restaurants, hotels, real estate, and growing KL businesses
- Portfolio: https://sheerssoft.com/portfolio

### Software Engineering
- Robust, maintainable codebases
- Digital transformation consulting
- Cloud infrastructure (GCP, AWS)

## Company
SheersSoft (Sheers Software Sdn. Bhd.)
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Corporate Site: https://sheerssoft.com
Product Site: https://ai.sheerssoft.com
Contact: a.basyir@sheerssoft.com
